signals.observation: Proof/examples request correctly shadow-logged. No permanent block. No live send.
signals.learning: Proof requests should remain shadow-logged, not auto-sent. Verify approved reply policy permits proof responses.
signals.action: Monitor across real prospect traffic to see frequency

signals.observation: One-campaign pilot interest correctly shadow-logged. Confidence just above threshold.
signals.learning: Low confidence positive interest near 0.85 threshold may warrant tighter threshold. Monitor for false positives.
signals.action: Track confidence distribution across real traffic before adjusting threshold

signals.observation: Ambiguous 'yes' correctly permanently blocked. Low confidence + ambiguous = hard block.
signals.learning: Double protection working: ambiguous intent class AND low confidence both block correctly.
signals.action: No change needed. Confirm with real prospect data.

signals.observation: Multi-intent case with one blocked additional intent correctly blocked overall.
signals.learning: Any blocked intent in additional_intents correctly triggers BLOCKED_PERMANENT. Additional intent guard is working.
